name: Spoon Bread
recipeIngredient: 4 oz Canned diced green chiles, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine corn, milk, shortening, eggs, cornmeal, baking soda, baking powder, and salt in a large bowl until well mixed.
2. Stir in the drained canned diced green chiles and shredded cheddar cheese.
3. Pour the mixture into a greased 9-inch square pan.
4. Bake at 400°F for 45 minutes or until golden brown.
5. Serve hot.
